name: torchscript-dag-viewer
description: Readonly custom editor for trusted TorchScript traced .pt files with a top-down operator DAG webview.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: TorchScript parsing loads trusted .pt files through torch.jit.load, which may execute malicious pickle payloads. Open only in trusted workspaces.

torchscriptDagViewer.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to parse trusted TorchScript .pt files. When empty, the extension tries python3 and python.

torchscriptDagViewer.maxFileBytes.description: Maximum .pt file size in bytes that the extension will attempt to parse.

torchscriptDagViewer.maxNodes.description: Maximum graph nodes allowed before parsing returns a structured error.

torchscriptDagViewer.maxEdges.description: Maximum graph edges allowed before parsing returns a structured error.

torchscriptDagViewer.parseTimeoutMs.description: Maximum parser subprocess runtime in milliseconds.
